name: Podium Application Dashboard

tiles.name: Request Rate
tiles.query: requests | summarize RequestCount = count() by bin(timestamp, 5m) | order by timestamp desc
tiles.description: Number of requests over time (5-minute intervals)

tiles.name: Average Response Time by Endpoint
tiles.query: requests | summarize AvgDuration = avg(duration) by name | order by AvgDuration desc | take 10
tiles.description: Top 10 slowest API endpoints by average response time

tiles.name: Active Users (Last Hour)
tiles.query: customMetrics | where name == 'ActiveUsers' and timestamp > ago(1h) | summarize max(value)
tiles.description: Maximum active users in the last hour

tiles.name: Video Upload Success Rate
tiles.query: customEvents | where name in ('VideoUploadSuccess', 'VideoUploadFailure') | summarize count() by name
tiles.description: Success vs. failure rate for video uploads

tiles.name: Database Query Performance
tiles.query: dependencies | where type == 'SQL' | summarize AvgDuration = avg(duration), Count = count() by name | order by AvgDuration desc | take 10

tiles.name: Exception Count by Type
tiles.query: exceptions | summarize Count = count() by type, outerMessage | order by Count desc | take 20
tiles.description: Most common exceptions in the application

tiles.name: Authentication Success vs Failure
tiles.query: customEvents | where name in ('AuthenticationSuccess', 'AuthenticationFailure') | summarize count() by name, bin(timestamp, 1h)

tiles.name: Slow Requests (>2s)
tiles.query: requests | where duration > 2000 | project timestamp, name, duration, url, resultCode | order by duration desc | take 50
tiles.description: Recent slow API requests taking more than 2 seconds

tiles.name: Hangfire Job Status
tiles.query: customEvents | where name startswith 'Hangfire' | summarize count() by name

tiles.name: API Calls by Endpoint
tiles.query: requests | summarize count() by name | order by count_ desc | take 10
tiles.description: Distribution of API calls across top endpoints

tiles.name: Scholarship Offer Conversions
tiles.query: customMetrics | where name == 'ScholarshipOfferConversion' | summarize count() by tostring(customDimensions.Status)

notes: This dashboard provides a comprehensive view of the Podium application's health and performance.
Tiles use Kusto Query Language (KQL) to retrieve data from Application Insights.
To import: Go to Azure Portal > Application Insights > Workbooks > New > Advanced Editor > Paste JSON
